name: Workbench
description: Developer workbench and IDE-like application with split-pane workspace, file browser, document editor, terminal, and settings.

pages.notes: Primary workspace: split-pane layout with resizable panels, doc-editor for the active file or document
File browser: page-tree for navigating the file hierarchy, doc-editor for viewing and editing the selected file
Terminal view: log-stream for command output and logs, status-bar at the bottom showing connection status and metrics
Workspace settings: account settings for profile and auth, form sections for editor preferences, keybindings, and extensions

page_briefs.workspace: Split-pane layout with draggable dividers. Left pane shows a file tree or outline; right pane holds the doc editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and a minimap. Tabs along the top for multiple open files. Command palette accessible via keyboard shortcut.
page_briefs.files: Page-tree file browser on the left with expandable folders, file type icons, and search. Doc-editor on the right showing the selected file with full editing capabilities. Breadcrumb path above the editor.
page_briefs.terminal: Log-stream occupying most of the viewport with monospace output, ANSI color support, and auto-scroll. Status bar at the bottom showing working directory, branch name, connection status, and resource usage indicators.
page_briefs.settings: Account settings with profile, API tokens, and connected services. Structured form sections for editor theme, font size, tab width, keybinding scheme, installed extensions, and workspace-level overrides.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible activity bar with icon navigation and main content area
